units.content: W3C SOSA/SSN Ontology issued as W3C Recommendation 19 October 2017, revised 19 July 2023
SOSA/SSN is the closest standards-side precedent for the pattern of instrument node with characterising property edges alongside observation triples
sosa:Sensor is a first-class node; ssn-system:SystemProperty edges attach accuracy, sensitivity, and measurement range
SOSA/SSN characterises physical-sensor capability ranges; the invention characterises training-time design choices of computational measurers
SOSA/SSN uses a specialised SystemProperty sub-schema; the invention uses the same six-field directed-entry schema for all characterisation
SOSA/SSN provides no predictor of divergence between two sensors; the invention does
